name: player_team_success_rate single-year no-split pools team plays in player's games (executed-result parity)
description: Seed team ZZ plays in 2023 (2 of 3 successful) with the test player on ZZ. The single-year force_player_active variant pools the team's plays over the player's active game-weeks = 2/3 = 0.6667, proving the (off, year, week) base-CTE projection lets the pid-keyed gamelogs join resolve and recombine num/den in a plain single-year view (no offset range).
expected_query: with "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(*) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) / sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_success_rate_from_plays from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_gamelogs"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" inner join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" on "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team" and "nfl_games"."season_year" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year" and "nfl_games"."week" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."week" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays" AS "team_success_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats" on "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, current_nfl_team) VALUES ('TEST-PTSR-000916','Test','Ptsr','T.Ptsr','Test Ptsr','ZZ','ZZ','2000-01-01',2020,'ZZ')
INSERT INTO nfl_games (esbid, season_year, week, season_type, v, h) VALUES (991001, 2023, 1, 'REG', 'ZZ', 'OP')

INSERT INTO player_gamelogs (esbid, pid, opponent_nfl_team, nfl_team, pos, season_year, rushing_first_downs, receiving_first_downs, rushing_yards_excluding_kneels) VALUES (991001, 'TEST-PTSR-000916', 'OP', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', 2023, 0, 0, 0)
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, off, successful_play) VALUES (991001,1,2023,1,0,'REG','PASS','ZZ',true)
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, off, successful_play) VALUES (991001,2,2023,1,0,'REG','PASS','ZZ',true)
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, off, successful_play) VALUES (991001,3,2023,1,0,'REG','RUSH','ZZ',false)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS team_success_rate_from_plays_0 FROM nfl_plays WHERE off='ZZ' AND year IN (2023) AND seas_type='REG' AND play_type <> 'NOPL'
